queries.question: Can you list the sourcing platforms each recruiter uses?
queries.sql: SELECT Sources.source_name  from Recruiters_Sources join Sources on Recruiters_Sources.source_id = Sources.source_id join Recruiters on Recruiters_Sources.recruiter_id = Recruiters.recruiter_id   GROUP BY Recruiters_Sources.source_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Recruiters_Sources.recruiter_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Recruiters)

queries.question: Can you list the sourcing platforms each recruiter uses?
queries.sql: select recruiters.name , sources.source_name from Recruiters_Sources join Sources on Recruiters_Sources.source_id = Sources.source_id join Recruiters on Recruiters_Sources.recruiter_id = Recruiters.recruiter_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?source_name WHERE {
  ?recruiters_sources a :Recruiters_Sources .
  ?sources a :Sources .
  ?recruiters_sources p:hasSources ?sources .
  ?recruiters a :Recruiters .
  ?recruiters_sources p:hasRecruiters ?recruiters .
  ?recruiters p:name ?name .
  ?sources p:source_name ?source_name .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Can you list the sourcing platforms each recruiter uses?
